notes: Denmark's capital and largest city, seat of government and the monarchy, and the country's economic and cultural centre.
Denmark's second-largest city and the principal hub of the Jutland peninsula; a major port and university city.
The main city of the island of Funen and the birthplace of author Hans Christian Andersen.
The largest city of North Jutland, set on the Limfjord; a historic harbour and industrial city known today for its revived waterfront.
Denmark's youngest major city and its principal North Sea port, a centre for the fishing and offshore energy industries.
